title: Student Game Dev Summit 2026
description: The Student Game Dev Summit is an inter-university event designed to inspire growth and collaboration among students interested in pursuing game development. Whether you’re a programmer, artist, musician, or game designer, this is a space for you to meet people, network, and explore what the future of Quebec’s gaming industry will look like!
location: ETS, 2nd Floor du pavillion E, salon des diplomes E-2033 1220, rue Notre-Dame Ouest Montreal,QC, H3C 1K5
